description: Every Benzinga calendar, news, fundamentals, and signal endpoint as a typed command, plus an offline SQLite store, full-text search, cross-entity queries, and the first Benzinga MCP server.

novel_features.name: Overnight watchlist change scan
novel_features.description: See everything that changed on your tickers since you last looked — new ratings, price-target moves, breaking news, and signals in one diff.

novel_features.name: Single-ticker move explainer
novel_features.description: Build one time-ordered catalyst timeline for a ticker by merging unusual options, block trades, halts, rating changes, and news.

novel_features.name: Unified forward catalyst agenda
novel_features.description: One forward-dated agenda per ticker set unioning earnings, dividends, splits, IPOs, FDA dates, conference calls, guidance, and offerings.

novel_features.name: Analyst & firm accuracy scorecard
novel_features.description: Rank rating-issuing firms and analysts by Benzinga's historical accuracy, and tag today's rating changes with the issuer's hit rate.

novel_features.name: Earnings surprise tracker
novel_features.description: Compute EPS and revenue beat/miss and surprise % from the earnings calendar and link each name to its conference call and transcript.

novel_features.name: Clustered congressional buying
novel_features.description: Flag tickers where several distinct members of Congress filed purchases within a window — cluster detection beyond a single disclosure.
